Metadata.title: Denuncia Cívica
Metadata.description: Platform for documenting and raising awareness of alleged political prisoners. Secure, verified, transparent.
Metadata.keywords: report, human rights, political prisoners, transparency

Footer.description: Independent platform for documenting and raising awareness of alleged political prisoners.

Home.heroTitle: Every political prisoner has a name and deserves to be seen
Home.heroSubtitle: We document, verify, and raise awareness of alleged political prisoners. Your report can be the first step toward freedom.
Home.featuredSubtitle: Cases that have passed our verification process.
Home.ctaTitle: Do you know a case that needs to be documented?
Home.ctaSubtitle: Your report is confidential. We protect your identity and the detainee's.

TrustIndicators.title: Your security is our priority
TrustIndicators.subtitle: We design every aspect of the platform to protect those who report.
TrustIndicators.encryptedDesc: All information is stored with end-to-end encryption.
TrustIndicators.anonymizationDesc: Reporters can protect their identity at any time.
TrustIndicators.verificationDesc: Every case goes through a review process before being published.
TrustIndicators.noTrackingDesc: We do not use third-party cookies or tracking tools.

Explorar.title: Explore cases
Explorar.subtitle: {total} documented cases. {verified} verified.
Explorar.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, location, or description...

Denunciar.step1Subtitle: Who do you want to report?
Denunciar.importantList1: This platform documents alleged cases of political prisoners.
Denunciar.importantList2: We are not a legal body and do not replace legal representation.
Denunciar.importantList3: Your report will be reviewed by trained moderators.
Denunciar.importantList4: You can choose to keep your identity anonymous.
Denunciar.dataProtectionDesc: All data is transmitted encrypted. We do not share information with third parties. You can request the deletion of your report at any time.
Denunciar.consent: I understand that this platform is for documentation and awareness. I declare that the information I will provide is truthful to the best of my knowledge.
Denunciar.detentionLocationPlaceholder: Address or location where the detention occurred
Denunciar.detentionCenterPlaceholder: Name and location of the facility where the person is held
Denunciar.circumstancesHelp: Describe how the detention occurred, in what context, and any relevant details. Minimum 20 characters.
Denunciar.circumstancesPlaceholder: Describe the circumstances of the detention in as much detail as possible...
Denunciar.evidenceTip: Include dates, names of witnesses (if applicable), authorities involved, and any documentation that supports the case.
Denunciar.attachEvidenceDesc: Photos, documents, or videos (max 10MB per file). JPG, PNG, or PDF.
Denunciar.reporterInfoNote: Your information is used solely to verify the report. It will never be published without your explicit consent.
Denunciar.emailHelp: To send you updates on the case status.
Denunciar.relationshipPlaceholder: E.g.: family member, lawyer, witness, journalist...
Denunciar.anonymousCheckbox: I want my identity to be completely anonymous in this report
Denunciar.reviewWarning: By submitting this report, you confirm that the information provided is truthful to the best of your knowledge. False reports can affect the credibility of legitimate cases.
Denunciar.encryptedConnection: Encrypted connection — Your data is protected
Denunciar.successMessage: Your report has been securely received. A moderator will review it within the next 48 hours. You will receive updates at your email address.
Denunciar.trackingCodeHelp: Save this code to check the status of your report.
Denunciar.dataEncrypted: Your data is encrypted and protected

Consultar.title: Track status
Consultar.subtitle: Enter your tracking code to check the status of your report.
Consultar.codeHelp: The code was provided when you filed your report. Example: DC-2026-00142
Consultar.notFoundError: Tracking code not found. Please verify it is written correctly.
Consultar.genericError: An error occurred while searching. Please try again.
Consultar.submittedDesc: Your report has been received and is queued for review.
Consultar.underReviewDesc: A moderator is reviewing your report and the provided evidence.
Consultar.infoRequestedDesc: Additional information is required. Check your email.
Consultar.verifiedDesc: The case has been verified and published on the platform.
Consultar.rejectedDesc: The case could not be verified. Details are sent by email.
Consultar.privacyNote: The search does not reveal sensitive case information

CaseDetail.notFoundDesc: The case you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
CaseDetail.supportDesc: Your support helps prioritize the visibility of this case. It's not a "like" — it's an act of solidarity.

Sobre.title: About Denuncia Cívica
Sobre.subtitle: We are an independent platform dedicated to documenting, verifying, and raising awareness of alleged political prisoners in Latin America.
Sobre.missionText: We believe that invisibility is a form of oppression. When a political prisoner is ignored, their suffering is perpetuated. Denuncia Cívica exists to break that silence, providing a secure, verified, and accessible platform where every case can be documented and made visible.
Sobre.processStep1Desc: Anyone can file a report securely and, if desired, anonymously.
Sobre.processStep2Desc: A team of trained moderators reviews each case, requests additional information if necessary, and verifies authenticity.
Sobre.processStep3Desc: Verified cases are published on the platform, always protecting the safety of the reporter and the detainee.
Sobre.processStep4Desc: Social communicators and media can select cases to provide media coverage.
Sobre.securityEncryptionDesc: All information is transmitted and stored with end-to-end encryption.
Sobre.securityAnonymizationDesc: Reporters can hide their identity at any point in the process.
Sobre.securityNoTrackingDesc: We do not use tracking cookies, third-party analytics, or advertising.
Sobre.securityTransparencyDesc: We publish periodic reports on our verification process and metrics.
Sobre.roleReporterDesc: Registers cases of alleged political prisoners. Can do so anonymously.
Sobre.roleModeratorDesc: Reviews and verifies reports received. Requests additional information when necessary.
Sobre.roleCommunicatorDesc: Journalist or social communicator who selects verified cases for coverage.
Sobre.rolePublicUserDesc: Explores verified cases, offers support, and shares information.
